{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Natarianath
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Natarianath]] was an empress and a noble ancestor of [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
